description: The AssetMultiplexer component is used to drive an asset field from a list of assets and an index within the list.

fields.Index: Which element in ``Assets`` to drive to ``Target``
fields.Assets: The list of assets to multiplex between.

usage:
Add the list of assets you want to use through the SyncAssetList area, then add in your assets into the items. Then you can specify the field through the Target you wanna switch between different assets for. Changing the Index will change which asset the Target has in it.

Ensure you can set the Target field on this component before making any other components reference the Index field on this component if you don't wanna waste your time.
